findings.issue: CONFIRMED R9-A finding: en choice labels are lowercase 'a. b. c. d.' — duplication-artifact / wrong case. Spec requires uppercase A. B. C. D.
findings.recommended_fix: Uppercase all en choice prefixes to A./B./C./D.

findings.issue: Double break: en mixes lowercase a./b. with uppercase C./D.; zh mixes Latin A/B with Katakana ウ/エ. Both languages broken in same question.
findings.recommended_fix: Uppercase en to A./B./C./D.; replace ウ/エ in zh with C/D.

findings.issue: All four zh choices carry raw Katakana ア/イ/ウ/エ — Japanese-script leakage into Chinese output.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace ア/イ/ウ/エ with A/B/C/D in zh choices.

findings.issue: CJK ordinals 甲乙丙丁 in zh.
Triple-style mix in zh: CJK ordinals 甲乙丙 + Katakana エ in same question.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace all four zh prefixes with A/B/C/D.

findings.issue: All four zh choices carry raw Katakana ア/イ/ウ/エ. Same severity as Q2.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace ア/イ/ウ/エ with A/B/C/D in zh choices.

notes: Worst page in batch: 0 clean leaves of 6. Confirms R9-A's lowercase-en artifact (Q0+Q1) and adds widespread zh-side script leakage. Translation bodies remain faithful (technical terms accurate).
